summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a high‑energy 1986 show with standout performances of Cold Rain, Race Is On, High Time and The Other One
review: Fans rave about the crystal‑clear soundboard source and describe the concert as bubbling, joyous, and full of classic Dead magic. Highlights include Jerry’s soaring solo on “They Love Each Other,” a ripping first set featuring “Cold Rain” and “Race Is On,” and a second‑set flow that builds through “The Other One → Comes A Time” and a blistering Scarlet > Fire sequence. The only blemish was the show being cut short after an on‑stage incident, but reviewers agree it never hurt the music.

ai_rating.rationale: Average reviewer rating is ~4.6 / 5, with consistent praise for both performance and recording quality; many detailed positive comments give strong confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the sound "great", "super", "A+" and note crisp, clear mix with no noticeable drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set bursts with energy (Cold Rain, Race Is On, High Time) and segues into a jam‑heavy second set that builds through The Other One → Comes A Time and ends with a fiery Scarlet > Fire/Sugar Magnolia climax. No encore due to an on‑stage incident but the momentum never falters.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his soaring solo on "They Love Each Other", loving every minute of "Cold Rain", and a noted guitar failure during Sugar Magnolia that added drama.
band_member_comments.Phil: Repeatedly described as having his “mind blown”, dropping bombs, and delivering true, solid bass throughout.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned as high in the mix, strumming along, and contributing vocal fire on the first set.
